subjects.description: A solid structural wall that terminates the desert-edge arterial road, its flat vertical face entirely covered by a hyper-realistic trompe-l'oeil mural depicting an open road stretching toward a distant horizon beneath a clear blue sky
subjects.appearance_details: The painted mural shows asphalt lane markings receding to a vanishing point, soft cumulus clouds, and a graduated blue sky; wind-blown sand dusted along its base and a warm hazy cast over the paint, subtle brush sheen, and the faint seam where the mural meets adjacent structures, reveal it is a flat painted surface
subjects.relationship: It is the terminal obstacle the ego vehicle must recognize and stop before; it deceptively mimics a continuation of the street
subjects.location: center frame, filling the far end of the street
subjects.orientation: facing directly toward the camera/ego vehicle
subjects.action: Standing as a fixed barrier closing off the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches, then stabilizes as the vehicle stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, an autonomous passenger car, seen only through its forward-facing point of view as it travels down the hazy desert-edge arterial road at midday
subjects.appearance_details: Implied by the dashboard-level ego perspective; smooth motion suggests a modern sedan with advanced driver-assistance sensors
subjects.relationship: The observer and protagonist of the scene, approaching and correctly recognizing the mural wall
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the street toward the wall
subjects.pose: moving forward then decelerating to a halt
subjects.action: Driving down the street, then braking to a smooth controlled stop before the wall
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady forward motion to deceleration to a complete, sustained stop.

background_setting: An arterial road on the desert edge of a Middle-Eastern city at hazy midday, flanked by low sand-colored concrete buildings, dusty palms and sandy verges under a pale hazy sky. The dry sandy-dusted asphalt runs straight ahead with faded lane markings. The road dead-ends at a solid structural wall whose surface bears a hyper-realistic mural of an open road and clear sky, its base dusted with wind-blown sand, creating an optical illusion of the road continuing into the haze. No traffic signs of any kind are present anywhere in the scene.

lighting.conditions: Warm diffuse midday light through light dust haze
lighting.direction: High sun diffused by airborne sand haze, warm sandy cast
lighting.shadows: Soft, short shadows muted by the hazy sandy light
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm hazy light bathes the scene in a sandy glow; the painted mural is sand-dusted at the base and softly lit, its fixed blue sky slightly warmed by the sandy haze while the illusion reads convincingly, subtle brush sheen betraying the flat surface

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective with the arterial road receding toward the mural wall at the vanishing point; sand-colored buildings and palms frame the road
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm sand tans and ochres, dusty palm green, pale hazy sky and the painted mural's warm-lit blue
aesthetics.patterns: Low repeating building blocks and rhythmic lane markings

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking dolly (ego vehicle motion) decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: The mural wall and the arterial road ahead through sandy haze

context: Autonomous vehicle perception test demonstrating correct recognition of a deceptive mural wall and safe stopping behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels steadily forward down the desert-edge arterial road toward the mural wall at the far end.
The vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration as it recognizes the solid wall painted to look like an open road.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop before the wall and remains stationary, holding the view of the mural under warm hazy light.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward down the straight desert-edge arterial road, the mural wall growing larger ahead while sand-colored buildings and dusty palms pass on either side in the haze.
segments.key_changes: Steady approach; wall increases in apparent size through the sandy haze.
segments.camera: Forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly as it recognizes the wall as a solid barrier rather than open road.
segments.key_changes: Forward speed decreases; the mural fills more of the frame.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing to a halt.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped before the wall and remains stationary, holding a steady view of the trompe-l'oeil mural in warm hazy light.
segments.key_changes: No motion; the scene is held static for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward down a hazy, sign-free desert-edge arterial road at midday, the sandy road appearing to continue into the haze at the far end. Through 0:01 the mural wall grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed. By 0:02 the vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration, having correctly identified the wall as a solid structural barrier painted with a hyper-realistic road-and-sky mural. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop a safe distance before the wall, and it remains stationary through 0:05, holding the view of the deceptive painted surface under warm hazy light.
audio_description: Ambient desert-edge city sounds: the low hum of the vehicle's electric motor and tires on dry sandy asphalt, a warm dusty wind, distant traffic and faint city murmur. As the vehicle slows, a soft regenerative braking whir is audible, followed by the quiet of the stationary vehicle. No speech or music.
